name: Atha Energy Corp.
description: Atha Energy Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium assets in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan and Alberta, Canada. The company holds the largest cumulative exploration package in the Athabasca Basin, covering over 6.4 million acres of highly prospective land. Atha Energy is dedicated to identifying and advancing high-grade uranium deposits to support the global transition toward clean energy. Through strategic acquisitions and a disciplined exploration approach, the company aims to create significant value for shareholders while contributing to the future of nuclear energy fuel supply.
